narrative:
Danbury 1 (Marblehead) (precinct in Ottawa County) has 779 registered voters, with 43.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.2%, a clear Republican lean of 9.6 percentage points.
